POS OF PLTFF'S REPLY TO DEFTS' OPPOS TO MTN FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, DEC OF BABAK YOUSEFZADEH, DEC OF BRADY J FREY, DEC OF PETE SIRAGUSA, DEC OF DAVID DELUCCHI, DEC OF DREW PEKAREK, PLTFF'S OBJECTIONS TO DEFT'S EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF PLTFF'S MTN FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, RESPONSE TO DEFT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE AND DECS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF PLTFF'S MTN FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF BENTLY BIOFUELS COMPANY LLC DBA BENTLY BIOFUELS' MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT K. DAVID FISHER AND/OR ANY OTHER EMPLOYEE OF DEFENDANT 3D OIL & GREASE ARE ENJOINED FROM: (1) MISREPRESENTING THEMSELVES AS HAVING ANY CURRENT AFFILIATION WITH BENTLY BIOFUELS OR GOT GREASE; (2) WEARING A BENTLY BIOFUELS OR GOT GREASE UNIFORM WHILE PERFORMING ACTIVITIES IN THE SCOPE OF THEIR EMPLOYMENT AT 3D OIL & GREASE; (3) MOVING OR ALTERING A BENTLY BIOFUELS OR GOT GREASE OIL COLLECTION CONTAINER WITHOUT THE EXPRESS WRITTEN PERMISSION OF BENTLY BIOFUELS; (4) COLLECTING OIL FROM A BENTLY BIOFUELS OR GOT GREASE OIL COLLECTION CONTAINER WITHOUT THE EXPRESS WRITTEN PERMISSION OF BENTLY BIOFUELS; AND (5) COLLECTING OIL FROM AN OIL COLLECTION CONTAINER THAT THE 3D OIL & GREASE EMPLOYEE KNOWS IS INTENDED TO BE COLLECTED BY BENTLY BIOFUELS WITHOUT THE EXPRESS WRITTEN PERMISSION OF BENTLY BIOFUELS. MOTION DENIED AS TO SOLICITING BENTLY'S CUSTOMERS. IDENTITY OF BUSINESSES THAT USE COOKING OIL IS NOT CONFIDENTIAL. BENTLY HAS PRODUCED NO EVIDENCE THAT FISHER MISAPPROPRIATED CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Babak Yousefzadeh, Esq. of Sheppard Mullin, Tel. 415.774.3191, for plaintiff and moving party;
David Fisher, Tel. 415.370.3775, defendant appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The Court did not allow arguments because the defendant did not give proper notice that he will appear at the hearing to contest the tentative ruling. Thefore, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as the final ruling of the Court. PLAINTIFF BENTLY BIOFUELS COMPANY LLC DBA BENTLY BIOFUELS' Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party submitted a proposed order that complies with CCP 437c(g). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Atty. BABAK YOUSEFZADEH of Sheppard Mullin, LLP, Tel No. (415) 434-9100 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. STEPHEN D. COLLINS of Tingley Law Group, PC, Tel. No. (408) 283-7000, moving party;
Client defendant K. David Fisher, Tel. No. (415) 370-3775 also appearing in court.

RULING - Matter was discussed. Atty. STEPHEN D. COLLINS of Tingley Law Group, PC's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Defendants K. DAVID FISHER and 3D OIL&GREASE LLC is GRANTED based on a showing of good cause. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BABAK YOUSEFZADEH OF THE SHEPPARD MULLIN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 774-3191 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KEVIN W. ISAACSON OF THE TINGLEY LAW GROUP, P.C., TEL. NO. (408) 283-7000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BENTLY BIOFUELS COMPANY LLC DBA BENTLY BIOFUELS' Motion For Preliminary Injunction is Granted in part and denied in part. Defendant K. David Fisher and/or any other employee of Defendant 3D Oil & Grease are enjoined from: (1) misrepresenting themselves as having any current affiliation with Bently Biofuels or Got Grease; (2) wearing a Bently Biofuels or Got Grease uniform while performing activities in the scope of their employment at 3D Oil & Grease; (3) moving or altering a Bently Biofuels or Got Grease oil collection container without the express written permission of Bently Biofuels; (4) collecting oil from a Bently Biofuels or Got Grease oil collection container without the express written permission of Bently Biofuels; and (5) collecting oil from an oil collection container that the 3D Oil & Grease employee knows is intended to be collected by Bently Biofuels without the express written permission of Bently Biofuels. Motion denied as to soliciting Bently's customers. Identity of businesses that use cooking oil is not confidential. Bently has produced no evidence that Fisher misappropriated confidential information. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
